title: Two die as truck carrying explosives overturns
description: KNYSNA NEWS AND VIDEO - Two people died when...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Breaking News\n Video","html":"Breaking News\n Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS AND VIDEO - Two people died when a truck carrying explosives caught fire after an accident on the N2 at the Belvidere turn-off in Knysna at 04:00 this morning, Thursday 3 April.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS AND VIDEO - Two people died when a truck carrying explosives caught fire after an accident on the N2 at the Belvidere turn-off in Knysna at 04:00 this morning, Thursday 3 April."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The driver of the truck and a passenger died at the scene and a Provincial Emergency Response officer was taken to hospital after inhaling toxic fumes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Municipality's Emergency Services rushed to the scene, and managed to extinguish the fire.","html":"Knysna Municipality's Emergency Services rushed to the scene, and managed to extinguish the fire."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Clean-up operations, which includes the removal of the hazardous cargo, are under way, and the N2 has been closed to all traffic on the western side of Knysna from the Rheenendal turn-off and from its eastern side at the Red Bridge turn-off.","html":"Clean-up operations, which includes the removal of the hazardous cargo, are under way, and the N2 has been closed to all traffic on the western side of Knysna from the Rheenendal turn-off and from its eastern side at the Red Bridge turn-off."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The municipality said the truck's cargo \"has been isolated and the SAPS explosives unit, along with other relevant role-players, are currently on site\".","html":"The municipality said the truck's cargo \"has been isolated and the SAPS explosives unit, along with other relevant role-players, are currently on site\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"An emergency Joint Operations Centre had been established at the Knysna Emergency Services station to coordinate the response efforts and manage the incident.","html":"An emergency Joint Operations Centre had been established at the Knysna Emergency Services station to coordinate the response efforts and manage the incident."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The municipality said motorists should make alternative travel arrangements.","html":"The municipality said motorists should make alternative travel arrangements."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"VIDEO - Two people have been declared dead in an accident of a truck transporting hazardous material after it overturned and caught fire earlier this morning highway near Knysna."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video: Loyiso Dyongman","html":"Video: Loyiso Dyongman"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The driver of the truck and a passenger were declared dead at the scene.","html":"The driver of the truck and a passenger were declared dead at the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Smoke billows from the overturned truck.","html":"Smoke billows from the overturned truck."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
